productDisplayName: Timberland Men Jeunes Brown Casual Shoes
description: This winter, dress your little one up in these timberland Pawtuckaway Lace Hiker shoe and hit the trail in style. With comfort and rugged style, your little one's hikes are all set to get better.UpperLeather upper with nubuck patch at the lacing systemDurable leather overlays as the toe cap, side midfoot patches and heel cap for enhanced durabilityHigh ankle for enhanced protection to the lower leg and for styleMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitFabric inner lining for all-day, sweat-free comfortPadded fabric lined footbed for all-day breathable comfortMidsoleEVA moulded midsole for all-day comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a branded leather conditioner and nubuck brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
